name: Epurrely Beauty
name_jp: エピュアリィ・ビューティ
desc:
2 Level 2 monsters
Once per turn: You can target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. This is a Quick Effect if this card has "Purrely Pretty Memory" as material. Up to thrice per turn, when you activate a "Purrely" Quick-Play Spell Card (Quick Effect): You can attach that card on the field to this card as material, then you can change the battle position of 1 monster your opponent controls.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 2 monsters
Once per turn: You can target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. This is a Quick Effect if this card has "Purrely Pretty Memory" as material. Up to thrice per turn, when you activate a "Purrely" Quick-Play Spell Card (Quick Effect): You can attach that card on the field to this card as material, then you can change the battle position of 1 monster your opponent controls.
eff:
2 Level 2 monsters
Once per turn: You can target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. This is a Quick Effect if this card has "Purrely Pretty Memory" as material. Up to thrice per turn, when you activate a "Purrely" Quick-Play Spell Card (Quick Effect): You can attach that card on the field to this card as material, then you can change the battle position of 1 monster your opponent controls.

action: Applies effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
Attaches from your field as Xyz Material
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
misc: Can be activated during either player's turn
